data.title: Perpetua Resources Holds 2025 Annual Shareholders Meeting
data.description:
Protect Your Portfolio Against Market Uncertainty

  • Discover companies with rock-solid fundamentals in TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter.
  • Receive undervalued stocks, resilient to market uncertainty, delivered straight to your inbox.

Perpetua Resources ( (PPTA) ) has provided an update.

Perpetua Resources Corp. held its 2025 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders on May 15, 2025. During the meeting, shareholders elected directors for terms expiring at the 2026 annual meeting and ratified the appointment of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025.

The most recent analyst rating on (PPTA) stock is a Buy with a $18.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Perpetua Resources stock, see the PPTA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PPTA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PPTA is a Neutral.

Perpetua Resources presents a mixed picture. The strong technical momentum could attract speculative interest, but financial fundamentals are weak, with no revenue and reliance on financing for cash flow. The stock’s valuation is unappealing due to the lack of profitability and dividend yield. Investors should be cautious of the overbought technical indicators and consider the company’s long-term revenue generation challenges.

To see Spark’s full report on PPTA stock, click here.

More about Perpetua Resources

Average Trading Volume: 1,132,003

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $823.5M

Akamai ( (AKAM) ) has shared an update.

On May 14, 2025, Akamai Technologies held its annual meeting where stockholders approved several significant amendments, including an increase of 8 million shares for the company’s Stock Incentive Plan and changes to its Certificate of Incorporation to eliminate supermajority voting requirements. Additionally, the meeting saw the election of board members and ratification of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent accounting firm, reflecting a strategic shift towards more shareholder-friendly governance practices.

The most recent analyst rating on (AKAM) stock is a Buy with a $115.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Akamai stock, see the AKAM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AKAM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AKAM is a Outperform.

Akamai Technologies displays financial resilience with strong revenue and profitability metrics. Technical analysis suggests caution due to bearish trends, while the valuation remains moderate. Recent earnings call and corporate events highlight growth potential, despite some concerns in delivery revenue and macroeconomic factors.

To see Spark’s full report on AKAM stock, click here.

More about Akamai

Akamai Technologies, Inc. operates in the technology industry, focusing on providing cloud services and content delivery network solutions. The company is known for its expertise in enhancing web and mobile performance, cybersecurity, and delivering media content.

It operates in the energy sector, focusing on the generation, transmission, and distribution of electricity. The company plays a significant role in Brazil’s electricity market and is involved in various projects related to hydroelectric power.

data.title: Alerio Gold Corp Launches $1 Million Private Placement to Fund Exploration
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Quickly and easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Alerio Gold Corp ( (TSE:ALE) ) just unveiled an update.

Alerio Gold Corp announced a non-brokered private placement offering of up to 50,000,000 units at $0.02 per unit, aiming to raise up to $1,000,000. The proceeds will be used for general working capital and exploration of the company’s mineral properties. This move is expected to bolster Alerio’s financial resources for its ongoing projects in Guyana, potentially enhancing its market position in the gold exploration sector. Existing shareholders are given priority in the offering, and the company may pay finders’ fees up to 8% of the gross proceeds.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ALE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ALE is a Underperform.

Alerio Gold Corp’s overall stock score is heavily impacted by its poor financial performance, characterized by a lack of revenue, negative equity, and persistent cash outflows. While technical indicators show some potential upward momentum, the negative valuation metrics, particularly the negative P/E ratio, highlight significant risks. The company needs strategic restructuring to improve its financial health.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ALE stock, click here.

More about Alerio Gold Corp

Alerio Gold Corp is a mineral exploration and development company focused on acquiring and exploring gold properties, primarily in Guyana, South America. The company holds a 100% interest in two properties located in Guyana.

Average Trading Volume: 137,978

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$2.53M

Confident Investing Starts Here:

An update from Whitestone REIT ( (WSR) ) is now available.

On May 15, 2025, Whitestone REIT held its annual meeting of shareholders where several key proposals were voted on. The election of trustees resulted in Julia B. Buthman, Amy S. Feng, Kristian M. Gathright, David K. Holeman, Jeffrey A. Jones, and Donald A. Miller being elected to the Board of Trustees until 2026. Additionally, the amendment to the 2018 Long-Term Equity Incentive Plan was ratified, executive compensation was approved, and the appointment of Pannell Kerr Forster of Texas, P.C. as the independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025, was confirmed.

The most recent analyst rating on (WSR) stock is a Buy with a $16.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Whitestone REIT stock, see the WSR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WSR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WSR is a Outperform.

Whitestone REIT’s overall score reflects its strong financial performance and positive earnings call outcomes, with robust revenue growth and operational efficiency. However, high leverage and recent declines in occupancy pose risks. Technical indicators suggest caution due to prevailing bearish trends. Valuation remains fair, with a strong dividend yield balancing a higher P/E ratio.

To see Spark’s full report on WSR stock, click here.

More about Whitestone REIT

Whitestone REIT operates in the real estate investment trust (REIT) industry, focusing on the acquisition, ownership, and management of commercial properties, primarily in business-friendly markets.

data.title: Venu Holding Acquires Land for Sunset Amphitheater
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Quickly and easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Venu Holding Corporation ( (VENU) ) has shared an announcement.

On May 13, 2025, Venu Holding Corporation acquired a 20-acre tract of land in El Paso, Texas, to develop The Sunset Amphitheater, a 12,500-person venue, under a Chapter 380 Economic Development Program Agreement. The City of El Paso provided incentives, including an $8 million forgivable loan, contingent on Venu meeting specific development and operational milestones. Additionally, Venu reported strong first-quarter 2025 financial results, with total assets rising to over $212 million and significant sales from its Luxe FireSuite model. The company is accelerating its expansion through new partnerships and strategic investments, aiming to enhance its market leadership in the live entertainment industry.

The most recent analyst rating on (VENU) stock is a Buy with a $15.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Venu Holding Corporation stock, see the VENU Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VENU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VENU is a Neutral.

Venu Holding Corporation’s strong revenue growth is overshadowed by its profitability and cash flow challenges. The bearish technical indicators further weigh on the stock’s prospects, while the negative P/E ratio highlights ongoing financial difficulties. The company’s robust equity position offers some reassurance, but significant improvements in operational efficiency are necessary for a more favorable outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on VENU stock, click here.

More about Venu Holding Corporation

Venu Holding Corporation, listed on NYSE American as VENU, is a premier developer, owner, and operator of upscale live music venues and premium hospitality destinations. The company is known for crafting luxury, artist-centric, experience-driven entertainment destinations, with campuses in Colorado Springs, Colorado, and Gainesville, Georgia. VENU is expanding with new multi-season Sunset Amphitheaters in Oklahoma and Texas, aiming to redefine the premium live entertainment experience.

Average Trading Volume: 20,856

Current Market Cap: $293.5M

For a thorough assessment of VENU stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
